new in 2008. This variable applies only to enhanced plans with gap coverage. This 
variable also appears in the Plan Characteristics - Base File (see GAP_PARTIAL_TIER_01 - 
GAP_PARTIAL_TIER_07). 

The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit. The 
CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). ^ Back to TOC ^
